metadata.name: SCAPIS Co-abundance Network
metadata.description: Co-abundance network from the SCAPIS cohort (1x20M). 417 MSPs, 1,229 edges. Built with ScaleNet (ARACNE + Bayes HC consensus, presence frequency >= 0.8). Enriched with Gram staining, prevalence, clinical associations (cancer/CVD), and knowledge status.

annotations.clinical_associations: LDA scores + Bayes factors for 12 cancer/CVD comparisons (feature_importance_consistent.tsv)

nodes.label: msp_0512_Bacilli_A RF39 UBA660 CAG-302 sp. bacterium
nodes.species: Bacilli_A RF39 UBA660 CAG-302 sp. bacterium
